instruction: Create a Lock Screen widget for iOS26 that displays the current weather using WidgetKit and App Intents.
Refactor an ObservableObject-based counter to use the new @Observable macro for iOS26.
Create a visionOS immersive space that displays a 3D spinning cube.
Create a macOS26 menu bar extra using SwiftUI that shows the current battery level.
Create a watchOS26 interactive complication that lets users tap to cycle through workout types.
